name: Honyi International Company Limited
summary: Honyi International Company Limited manufactures and sells plastic injection molds. The company offers precision thermoplastic injection molds for use in various applications, including automotive, home appliances, computer, consumers, communication, electronics, etc. It also provides various enclosure manufacturing services, such as tooling fabrication, injection molding, sheet metal stamping, secondary post-molding process, and final assembly services in automotive, home appliance, and information tech. applications. Honyi International Company Limited was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
